title: vancasso Amber 24 Pieces Dinner Set for 6, Reactive Glaze Stoneware Plates and Bowls Set, Red Crockery Set with Dinner Plates, Dessert Plates, Soup Bowls & Cereal Bowls, Microwave & Dishwasher Safe
features: 【One-of-a-Kind Reactive Glaze Finish】Each piece of the AMBER dinner set features a stunning flambe reactive glaze that changes during firing, creating natural color variations. No two items are exactly alike—making every meal a special, artistic experience.

【Handcrafted Beauty & Timeless Design】Available in a vibrant palette of red, green, blue, yellow, and purple, the AMBER series captures the diversity of modern lifestyles. Bring passion to your table—our Red Dinner Set adds a bold pop of color that turns everyday meals into celebrations. It’s perfect for those who love dining with energy & joy.

【Complete Dinner Set for 6 People】This 24-piece ceramic plates and bowls set includes 6 dinner plates(10.25in), 6 dessert plates(8.25in), 6 cereal bowls(6.35in), 6 soup bowls(8.15in). Ideal for family meals, celebrations, or everyday use, offering both practicality and stunning design for your dining experience.

【Safe, Non-Toxic & Food-Friendly】Made from eco-friendly, LEAD-FREE and CADMIUM-FREE ceramic, the AMBER plate set ensures no chemical reactions with your food—whether hot or cold. It won’t absorb odors or flavors, keeping every meal safe and pure. Perfect for modern healthy living, it's a crockery set you can trust for years.

【Scratch-Resistant & Stackable Design】Fired at over 1300°C, this colorful reactive glaze stoneware offers excellent durability. The smooth, scratch-resistant surface withstands everyday use with cutlery. Each piece stacks securely to help organize your kitchen and save cabinet space without compromising on style.

【Customer Care with Heart】AMBER dinnerware is designed for lasting use, combining beauty with durability. If you ever receive a piece that is damaged or not up to standard, simply contact us—we will promptly provide a replacement and ensure your dining experience stays joyful.
description: Product Description From Kiln to Table, With Soul. AMBER Plates and Bowls set | Nature’s Color, Artisan’s Touch. Inspired by Amber – Nature’s Timeless Treasure The Amber series by vancasso is a tribute to nature’s quiet transformations—where flowing glazes meet raw textures, and no two pieces are ever the same. Fired at high temperatures, each item reveals its own unique hue and pattern, echoing the calm beauty of earth, fire, and time. Handmade in spirit and rich in depth, Amber brings warmth, serenity, and a sense of story to your everyday table. It’s not just dinnerware—it’s a living piece of art. From Clay to Table – the Journey of Beauty. High-Temperature Fired for Lasting Durability Kiln-fired at over 1300°C, the dense stoneware body prevents oil absorption, odors, and color fading. This durable dinnerware set maintains a smooth, hygienic surface—ideal for long-lasting microwave safe and dishwasher safe performance. Comfort in Every Bite Designed with rounded edges and a practical deep bowl that helps prevent spills, this dinnerware set features a reinforced rim design that makes it chip-resistant, durable for everyday stacking, handling, and long-lasting use in a modern kitchen. Stain & Food-Safe Glaze Food-safe glaze resists staining from coffee, tomato, and acidic sauces, ensuring lasting brilliance, keeping your plates and bowls brilliant and easy to clean. Simply rinse or wash, and they’ll stay as good as new for years. Safety & Durable Tested to withstand sudden temperature changes up to 180°C, making it safe for everyday transitions like fridge-to-microwave or serving hot soup in a cool bowl.(If there are no micro-cracks on the edge of the vessel).
